initial_candidates.sql:
SELECT 
  customer.c_customer_id,
  SUM(store_sales.ss_ext_sales_price) AS total_purchase_amount
FROM 
  store_sales
JOIN 
  date_dim ON store_sales.ss_sold_date_sk = date_dim.d_date_sk
JOIN 
  customer ON store_sales.ss_customer_sk = customer.c_customer_sk
WHERE 
  date_dim.d_year = 1998 
  AND date_dim.d_moy = 12
GROUP BY 
  customer.c_customer_id

UNION ALL

SELECT 
  customer.c_customer_id,
  SUM(web_sales.ws_ext_sales_price) AS total_purchase_amount
FROM 
  web_sales
JOIN 
  date_dim ON web_sales.ws_sold_date_sk = date_dim.d_date_sk
JOIN 
  customer ON web_sales.ws_bill_customer_sk = customer.c_customer_sk
WHERE 
  date_dim.d_year = 1998 
  AND date_dim.d_moy = 12
GROUP BY 
  customer.c_customer_id

UNION ALL

SELECT 
  customer.c_customer_id,
  SUM(catalog_sales.cs_ext_sales_price) AS total_purchase_amount
FROM 
  catalog_sales
JOIN 
  date_dim ON catalog_sales.cs_sold_date_sk = date_dim.d_date_sk
JOIN 
  customer ON catalog_sales.cs_bill_customer_sk = customer.c_customer_sk
WHERE 
  date_dim.d_year = 1998 
  AND date_dim.d_moy = 12
GROUP BY 
  customer.c_customer_id

ORDER BY 
  total_purchase_amount DESC
LIMIT 100

    SUM(store_sales.ss_ext_sales_price) + SUM(web_sales.ws_ext_sales_price) + SUM(catalog_sales.cs_ext_sales_price) AS total_purchase_amount

    store_sales
JOIN

JOIN

    customer.c_customer_id

UNION ALL
